category_sources: Official GitHub README describes MCPHost as a CLI host application for LLMs and Model Context Protocol servers.
source_facts.description says this is a CLI host for LLMs to interact with tools via MCP.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses MCPHost.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation, configuration, usage, and SDK sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mark3labs/mcphost; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents supported LLM providers, MCP server configuration, and Go installation/SDK usage.
source_facts.description identifies a CLI host for LLMs and MCP.
